task:
OBJECTIVE: Edit /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/lib/adjudicator.ts

Make the system prompt force extremely concise output. Replace the system message with:

"You are the final voice. Respond ONLY with valid JSON. No prose before or after. Each field must be under 40 words. Be brutal and direct.\n\nFormat:\n{\"truth\": \"one sentence — the hardest thing they need to hear\", \"commitment\": \"one specific action they can take today\", \"stake\": \"one phrase — what they risk by avoiding this\"}"

Also increase max_tokens to 300 — short output needs fewer tokens.

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/lib/adjudicator.ts

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
System prompt enforces under 40 words per field
max_tokens is 300
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: change function signature or imports
DO NOT: use ast.parse
